title: Runtime error: null pointer dereferenced on class field access
body:
Hello, found a regression in Verilator, attaching a PR (#5997) with a small test case --
to me it seems like it fails while trying to evaluate the LHS of `inst[i].field_val = 1;`
Git bisect points at #5628 (24b5c64).

Logs when running with --verilated-debug:
```
-V{t1,1}- Verilated::debug is on. Message prefix indicates {<thread>,<sequence_number>}.
-V{t1,2}+    Vt_class_field_access___024root___ctor_var_reset
-V{t1,3}+  Vt_class_field_access___024unit__03a__03acls__Vclpkg___ctor_var_reset
-V{t1,4}+        Vt_class_field_access___024unit___ctor_var_reset
-V{t1,5}+++++TOP Evaluate Vt_class_field_access::eval_step
-V{t1,6}+    Vt_class_field_access___024root___eval_debug_assertions
-V{t1,7}+ Initial
-V{t1,8}+    Vt_class_field_access___024root___eval_static
-V{t1,9}+    Vt_class_field_access___024root___eval_initial
-V{t1,10}+    Vt_class_field_access___024root___eval_initial__TOP
-V{t1,11}+          Vt_class_field_access___024unit__03a__03acls::new
-V{t1,12}+          Vt_class_field_access___024unit__03a__03acls::_ctor_var_reset
%Error: t/t_class_field_access.v:19: Null pointer dereferenced
Aborting...
```
